positive: A celestial raccoon raccoon on a stack of vintage occult books, looking inquisitively at a glowing crescent moon. The raccoon is sitting upright, portrayed with intricate fur texture and whiskers. Composition should be highly centralized, with the raccoon slightly elevated on the stack. Style: Neo-Victorian occult illustration meets modern minimalist graphic art. Use strong, jewel-toned blues, deep forest greens, and antique gold accents. Lighting should be dramatic, high contrast rim lighting, suggesting a magical glow emanating from the moon and the books. Clean silhouettes are paramount, suitable for a bold, single-color print on a t-shirt. Ink sketch quality, high detail, flat vector background elements. --ar 1:1
